raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work and articulates the delta but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta is missing.",
    "R1.7": "Audits every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unverified citation).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta is missing.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unverified citation).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
